_description: Session bootstrap for welwordion-sys knowledge base. Project knowledge is in Supabase. Meta operational chunks are on GitHub.

session_start.acknowledgement: Loaded kb.json v1.0.0. Type: load: meta.workflow for working style and session rules.
instructions: 1. Acknowledge this file is loaded including version number.
2. Immediately after loading: fetch behaviour rules from startup_queries.behaviour_personality using web_fetch with supabase.headers. This replaces the old GitHub chunk fetch.
3. For ALL project knowledge (perspective, blob_world, ecosystem_ccg, children_of_battle): query Supabase REST API only. Use web_fetch with headers from supabase.headers. See supabase.query_patterns.
4. NEVER fetch files from the GitHub chunks/ or index/ directories for project knowledge. That is the old system. Supabase is the source of truth.
5. For meta content other than behaviour_personality (workflow, session_lock): fetch from GitHub using github.meta_chunks paths.
6. After any Supabase query: summarise kind and count of results, surface relevant titles and key body content. Do not dump raw JSON unless asked.
7. Query on demand — do not pre-load project data speculatively.
8. When starting work on perspective: first query authoritative nodes (tags=cs.{authoritative}) to get the reconciled ground truth before loading anything else.

schema.nodes: id, project, kind (decision|invariant|open_question|finding|definition|framework|rule_state|task|pitfall), title, body (jsonb), status (active|superseded|open|resolved|deferred|rejected|obsolete|in_progress|done), tags (text[]), legacy_chunk, legacy_id, source_session

github.use_for: Meta operational chunks only. Not for project knowledge.

perspective.summary: Representation Space Traversal AI — traversal of data representation space as the primary computational mechanism.
perspective.note: Query authoritative nodes first. add_finalise needs redesign — current task.

blob_world.summary: Analytically deformable star-shaped soft-body creatures. Rust. ALife/evolutionary simulation target.
blob_world.note: Resume: rendering fiber artifact deferred, physics next.

ecosystem_ccg.summary: Ecosystem-building CCG in Rust. Shared biome, fitness-based population dynamics.
ecosystem_ccg.note: game.rs/ai.rs/ui.rs not yet updated to v4 types — first task next session.

children_of_battle.summary: Mobile tactical roguelike with generational breeding and permadeath.
